channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: 29 New Songs Out Today
item.description: 🎶 Fresh tunes alert! Dive into 29 new songs dropping today – let the music magic begin! 🔥🎵 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Victoria Monét Previews ‘Frequency of Love’ Album With New Song ‘Reach Out’
item.description: 🎶 Feel the love with Victoria Monét's new song ‘Reach Out’ 🌟 Album vibes incoming! #VictoriaMonét #NewMusicalert

item.title: Tour news: Dom Dolla / Peggy Gou / Basement Jaxx, Don Was, Ian Sweet, Thor & Friends, more
item.description: 🎶 Exciting lineup alert! 🎉 Dom Dolla, Peggy Gou, Basement Jaxx, and more hitting the road soon! Who's ready for a concert marathon? 🙌 #TourNews #LiveMusicFever

item.title: Oasis Break Beatles’ UK Chart Record, Return To Hot 100, Inspire Travis Scott’s New Sound
item.description: 🎸 Oasis rocks the charts, inspires new sounds! Legends making waves 🌊 #MusicNews #Oasis #TravisScott

item.title: Kacey Musgraves Heads South of the Border for ‘Mexico Honey’ Video
item.description: 🌵 Grooving with Kacey Musgraves in Mexico! 🎶 Check out her sweet new 'Mexico Honey' music video! 🎥💃 #KaceyMusgraves #NewMusicVideo
